name: 574 Útnesvegur — Snæfellsnes coastal loop
note: No F-road. Scenic ordinary road; may be narrow/condition-dependent in places. Use this instead of F570.

name: 711 Vatnsnesvegur — Hvítserkur access
note: No F-road. Ordinary rural road with gravel/slow sections likely; drive for conditions.

name: 862 Dettifossvegur — west-side Dettifoss
note: No F-road on the planned west-side Dettifoss access, but always check current road status.

name: 206 Fjaðrárgljúfur access
note: Use only the canyon access. Beyond here toward Lakagígar/Laki becomes F206 and is not included.

name: 218 Dyrhólaey access
note: No F-road. Access road can be condition/season dependent.

name: 249 Seljalandsfoss access
note: Planned stop is Seljalandsfoss/Gljúfrabúi only. Continuing inland toward Þórsmörk/F249 is not included.

name: 365 Lyngdalsheiði / Golden Circle connector
note: No F-road. Standard numbered connector; verify current conditions before driving.

name: Local Stokksnes/Vestrahorn access
note: No F-road. Local/private access; may involve fee and gravel.

name: F570 Jökulhálsleið — not used
note: F-road/highland route near Snæfellsjökull. This plan avoids it.

name: F206 Lakagígar/Laki — not used
note: Highland F-road continuation beyond the canyon area; not part of the route.

name: F249 Þórsmörk — not used
note: Highland road with river crossings toward Þórsmörk; not part of the route.

name: 939 Öxi shortcut — avoided
note: Gravel/mountain shortcut avoided; the plan uses Route 1 through the Eastfjords.
